UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. , AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA JR., HECTOR $807.55 PRINCIPAL, $331.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,139.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100099926)
